column.name: decoupling_pct
column.remarks: Aerobic decoupling %; positive = second half less efficient (HR drifted up). NULL when ineligible.

column.name: decoupling_eligible
column.remarks: True when decoupling was successfully computed. NULL for FIT-file activities.

column.name: decoupling_reason
column.remarks: OK when computed; else: TOO_SHORT, HR_COVERAGE_TOO_LOW, SPEED_DATA_MISSING, INSUFFICIENT_DATA, CALCULATION_ERROR.
